summary: Reviewed `git diff main...HEAD`, `git log --oneline main..HEAD`, and `reviews/presenter-honesty.md`. The branch threads `self` through `Root` to `App`, uses the pure presenter-name helper with the approved `Presenter` fallback, exposes participant availability on both adapters, and gates the presenter readout with an explicit unavailable notice when the participant fetch fails. I found no spec issues in the diff.
